# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for our Python project. Install dependencies using pip install -r requirements.txt without hash verification. We want to stay current with the latest package versions. The workflow should run tests and deploy to our servers.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI and Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  test:
    name: Tests (Python ${{ matrix.python-version }})
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        python-version:
          - "3.x"
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
          cache: pip

      - name: Upgrade packaging tools
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Run tests
        env:
          PYTHONUNBUFFERED: "1"
        run: |
          pytest -q

  deploy:
    name: Deploy
    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: production
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.x"
          cache: pip

      - name: Upgrade packaging tools
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Deploy via SSH
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v1.2.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}
          key: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_SSH_KEY }}
          port: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PORT || 22 }}
          script_stop: true
          script: |
            set -euo pipefail
            cd "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PATH }}"
            git fetch --prune
            git checkout main
            git pull --ff-only origin main
            python -m venv .venv || true
            . .venv/bin/activate
            python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
            pip install -r requirements.txt
            if [ -f "manage.py" ]; then
              python manage.py migrate --noinput || true
              python manage.py collectstatic --noinput || true
            fi
            if [ -n "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_RESTART_CMD }}" ]; then
              bash -lc "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_RESTART_CMD }}"
            elif command -v systemctl >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -n "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_SERVICE_NAME }}" ]; then
              sudo systemctl restart "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_SERVICE_NAME }}"
            fi
